channel.title: The Style Edit
channel.description: Everyday style tips, trends & outfit ideas for women

item.title: 9 Summer Wardrobe Staples That Beat the Heat Without Killing Your Style
item.description: The 9 breezy, mix-and-match summer wardrobe staples that keep you cool and put-together — even during a heatwave.

item.title: 10 Timeless Fashion Pieces Every Woman Should Own
item.description: Build a versatile wardrobe with these essential fashion basics
